instruction_ja:
[出力契約 — 機械検証用]
出力は次のJSONのみ(コードフェンス・説明文なし):
{"issues": [{"type": "...", "where": "...", "note": "..."}], "verdict": "ok|minor|major", "summary": "..."}
問題が無ければ "issues": [] かつ "verdict": "ok"。対象の中で確認できたことだけを書き、推測で問題を作らない。
instruction_en:
[Output contract — for mechanical verification]
Output ONLY this JSON (no code fences, no prose):
{"issues": [{"type": "...", "where": "...", "note": "..."}], "verdict": "ok|minor|major", "summary": "..."}
If there are no problems: "issues": [] and "verdict": "ok". Report only what you verified in the target; never invent findings.
render_ja: 1行目に verdict と issues の件数、以下 issues を「- [type] where: note」で箇条書き。
render_en: First line: verdict and issue count; then one bullet per issue as "- [type] where: note".
